rulings.Case Title: BRIAN ROBERTS et al VS. ALFA LAVAL INC SUED INDIVIDUALLLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things, Set One From Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc. And Request For Monetary Sanctions.
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, August 3, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel further responses to Plaintiffs Request For Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things, Set One From Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc. is granted in part and denied in part and the request for sanctions is denied. The motion is granted as to requests 13-14, 17-19, 22-29, 33-38 and 42-45 because the documents sought are described with reasonable particularity and defendant¿s objections are without merit. The motion is denied as to requests 1-12, 15-16 and 20-21 because those requests do not describe the documents sought with reasonable particularity. Plaintiff¿s separate statement omits any mention of requests 30-32 and 39-41. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is denied becasue many of their requests did not describe the documents sought with reasonable particularity. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. BARANCO et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Third Motion To Compel Defendant General Cable Corporations Person(S) Most Knowledgeable|Custodian Of Records Depositions And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, August 3, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Compliance hearing on plaintiffs¿ motion to compel deposition(s) and documents from defendant General Cable Corporation: if plaintiffs contend that defendant is not in full compliance with the order filed July 20, 2010, then by 4:00 p.m. today plaintiffs must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the asserted non-compliance and the parties must appear at the hearing at 9:00 a.m. on August 3. If no email is sent by 4:00 p.m., then the compliance hearing will be taken off calendar and the parties should not appear at the hearing. = (220/HEK)
